message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the east
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 4 people and 2 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should leave on monday
The train should leave after 08:30 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
